title: Palmers server pack
description: A modpack created to play on a small server with my friends. The aim is to remain Vanilla friendly, with small additions to make the world more immersive and fun.
body:
This modpack is designed to optimize performance while enhancing gameplay with simple, vanilla-like mods. Perfect for playing on a server with friends or enjoying a smoother solo experience.

## Key Features

- Performance Optimization: Carefully selected mods to maximize FPS and reduce lag without altering core mechanics.
- Vanilla+ Experience: Enhanced gameplay that stays true to the Minecraft spirit.
- Visual Enhancements: Improved graphics without sacrificing performance.
- Quality of Life Improvements: Subtle additions to make your Minecraft journey more enjoyable.

## Highlights

- Performance Mods: Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and more for unparalleled optimization.
- Gameplay Enhancements:

   - Farmer's Delight: New crops, foods, and cooking implements.
   - Small Ships: Explore the seas with craftable ships.

## Additional content
This pack includes additional content to enhance the visuals:
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)
- [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined/version/latest) (with custom config)
- [Compact Font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/compact-font)
